Off Calendar Jul-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SUSANNE ROE'S Motion To Seal Records Containing The Parties True Names IS GRANTED. THE SPECIFIC DOCUMENTS ADDRESSED BY THE MOTION MAY BE FILED UNDER SEAL. ANY FUTURE PLEADINGS MAY BE FILED USING FICTITIOUS NAMES. ANY DOCUMENTS FILED IN THE FUTURE CONTAINING THE TRUE NAMES MUST HAVE THOSE NAMES REDACTED. DOCUMENTS ERRONEOUSLY IN THE FILE WITH THE PARTIES TRUE NAMES SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND REPLACED WITH REDACTED COPIES. ANY REQUEST FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER MAY BE ADDRESSED TO THE DISCOVERY COMMISSIONER.
